items.name: Handala (Iran-linked hacktivist group)
items.targets: Stryker (US medical device manufacturer), Verifone (payment systems)
items.ttps: T1485 (Data Destruction/Wiper attacks), T1486 (Data Encrypted for Impact), T1589 (Gather Victim Identity Information), T1566 (Phishing)

items.name: ShinyHunters
items.targets: 400+ Salesforce Experience Cloud sites, mass-scanning campaign targeting customer data
items.ttps: T1190 (Exploit Public-Facing Application), T1213 (Data from Information Repositories), T1530 (Data from Cloud Storage Object)

items.name: APT28 (Fancy Bear, Russian state-sponsored)
items.targets: Ukrainian military forces, Signal and WhatsApp accounts
items.ttps: T1566 (Phishing), T1071 (Application Layer Protocol), T1087 (Account Discovery), T1005 (Data from Local System)

items.name: Lazarus Group (North Korean APT)
items.targets: AllSecure CEO via fake LinkedIn interview, developers via Gogs LFS vulnerability
items.ttps: T1566.001 (Spearphishing Attachment), T1204.002 (Malicious File), T1059 (Command and Scripting Interpreter)

items.name: Qilin Ransomware
items.ttps: T1486 (Data Encrypted for Impact), T1490 (Inhibit System Recovery), T1567.002 (Exfiltration to Cloud Storage)

items.name: Akira Ransomware
items.ttps: T1486 (Data Encrypted for Impact), T1490 (Inhibit System Recovery), T1059.001 (PowerShell)

items.name: CLOP Ransomware
items.ttps: T1486 (Data Encrypted for Impact), T1490 (Inhibit System Recovery), T1567 (Exfiltration Over Web Service)

items.name: Everest Ransomware
items.ttps: T1486 (Data Encrypted for Impact), T1567.002 (Exfiltration to Cloud Storage), T1485 (Data Destruction)

items.name: Coinbase Cartel
items.ttps: T1486 (Data Encrypted for Impact), T1567 (Exfiltration Over Web Service)

items.name: Chinese Nexus Actors
items.targets: Qatar government and private sector amid Iranian conflict, PlugX malware deployment
items.ttps: T1566.001 (Spearphishing Attachment), T1027 (Obfuscated Files or Information), T1071 (Application Layer Protocol)

items.name: BeatBanker / BTMOB
items.targets: Android users via phishing, deploys banking trojan and crypto miner
items.ttps: T1566.002 (Spearphishing Link), T1402 (Broadcast Receivers), T1406 (Obfuscated Files or Information), T1496 (Resource Hijacking)

items.name: GhostClaw / GhostLoader
items.targets: Developers via fake OpenClaw npm package, infostealer malware via fake Claude install pages
items.ttps: T1195.002 (Compromise Software Supply Chain), T1566 (Phishing), T1027 (Obfuscated Files or Information)

canada_landscape.summary: Canadian organizations remain under threat from multiple vectors. Canada Goose was breached by the Coinbase Cartel ransomware group. Meta disabled 150,000 accounts linked to Southeast Asian scam centers with Canadian victims identified. Phishing campaigns targeting Canadian entities include malicious ISO-attached resumés and ARPA domain abuse for detection evasion.
canada_landscape.retailers: Canada Goose breach claimed by Coinbase Cartel ransomware group
